s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR POWER WINDOW REGULATOR MOTOR ASSEMBLY

atten3.ptxt: The regulator arm must be below the intermediate position when installing the power window regulator motor.

s2.ptxt: Using a "TORX" driver (T25), install the power window regulator motor assembly with the 3 screws.

atten4.ptxt: The new rear window regulator adopts a self-tapping method. The installation position of the regulator will be threaded when the self-tapping screw is inserted.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR WINDOW REGULATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding parts of the rear door window regulator sub-assembly.
Install the temporary bolt to the rear door window regulator sub-assembly.
Temporarily install the window regulator.
Tighten the 4 bolts in the order shown in the illustration to install the rear door window regulator.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR GLASS RUN

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door glass run.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR GLASS SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Slide the rear door glass sub-assembly to install it as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR QUARTER WINDOW GLASS

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door quarter window glass to the rear door quarter window weatherstrip.
Install the rear door quarter window glass together with the rear door quarter window weatherstrip in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR LOWER WINDOW FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Insert the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly from above.
Install the rear door glass run to the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly.
Install the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly with the 2 bolts and screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Apply butyl tape to the rear door panel.
Pass the rear door lock remote control cable, rear door inside locking cable and each connector through a new rear door service hole cover.
Install the new rear door service hole cover.

atten3.ptxt: Securely install the rear door service hole cover avoiding wrinkles and air bubbles.

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector and clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw to install the No. 1 door scuff plate clamp.
Connect each connector.
Engage the rear door trim board with the 4 clips of the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.
Engage the 7 clips to install the rear door trim board to the rear door panel.
Install the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DOOR ASSIST GRIP COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 claws and install the door assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the rear door inside handle bezel plug.

s-1.ptxt: INITIALIZATION POWER WINDOW CONTROL SYSTEM
INSTALL FRONT POWER WINDOW REGULATOR MOTOR ASSEMBLY

atten3.ptxt: The regulator arm must be below the intermediate position when installing the power window regulator motor.

s2.ptxt: Using a "TORX" driver (T25), install the front power window regulator motor sub-assembly with the 3 screws.

atten4.ptxt: A new front window regulator adopts a self-tapping method. The installation position of the regulator will be threaded when the self-tapping screw is inserted.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR WINDOW REGULATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding parts of the front door window regulator sub-assembly.
Install the temporary bolt to the front door window regulator sub-assembly.
Temporarily install the window regulator.
Tighten the 6 bolts in the order shown in the illustration to install the front window regulator.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR GLASS SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Insert the front door glass sub-assembly into the front door panel along the front door glass run as indicated in the order of the arrows in the illustration.
Install the front door glass sub-assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Apply butyl tape to the front door panel.
Pass the front door lock remote control cable and rear door inside locking cable through a new front door service hole cover.
Install the new service hole cover.

atten3.ptxt: Securely install the front door service hole cover avoiding wrinkles and air bubbles.

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector and each clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT NO. 1 SPEAKER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front No. 1 speaker assembly with the 4 bolts.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the front door inner glass weatherstrip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the front door trim board with the 4 clips of the front door inner glass weatherstrip.
Engage the 9 clips and install the front door trim board to the front door panel.
Install the 3 screws and clip (A).

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COURTESY LIGHT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the claw and install the courtesy light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ASSIST GRIP COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 claws and install the assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and install the front door inside handle bezel plug.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR LOWER FRAME BRACKET GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the front door lower frame bracket garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INITIALIZE POWER WINDOW CONTROL SYSTEM
